## The discovery set

Explore different personalities and find the fragrance that feels like you.

[DISCOVER NOW](https://pernoire.com/cart/56935144915319:1)

You’ll receive a digital voucher by email, redeemable for a 50 ml perfume of your choice.

## the best seller

Try our signature scents.

Experience the perfumes of our Anima and Odus collections — and choose your favorite with a refund code sent via email.

[TRY NOW](https://pernoire.com/en-us/products/anelo)

Personality: **Adventurousness**

Inspired by fearless explorers, Anelo celebrates discovery and the allure of distant lands. Its blend of pineapple, pomelo, and amber captures the spirit of freedom and curiosity — the thrill of finding new worlds.

## OUR COLLECTIONS

[![Image 14: ANIMA](https://pernoire.com/cdn/shop/collections/Otimo2.png?v=1739521135&width=1000) ANIMA](https://pernoire.com/en-us/collections/anima)[![Image 15: ODUS](https://pernoire.com/cdn/shop/collections/333.png?v=1739521089&width=1000) ODUS](https://pernoire.com/en-us/collections/odus)

## OUR VALUES

At pernoire, every perfume is created to help you become your best self. Each scent reflects a distinct personality, giving you the freedom to explore who you are and who you want to be.

The idea was born from the friendship between Nico and Robin — two very different personalities who inspire each other to grow. In the same way, our fragrances are made to support you, to challenge you, and to bring out what’s already within.

[DISCOVER NOW](https://pernoire.com/en-us/pages/who)

![Image 16: Values image](https://pernoire.com/cdn/shop/files/Nico_and_Robin_Talking.jpg?v=1773679439&width=1600)

## WHAT OUR CLIENT SAYS

![Image 38: Reviews image](https://pernoire.com/cdn/shop/files/WHAT_OUR_CLIENTS_SAY-min.jpg?v=1776173529&width=1600)

 ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ 

A much-needed enrichment for the fragrance world. From Mansa, which lets you grasp the roots of oud while making opulence tangible, to Poka, whose mysterious sweetness verges on a heavenly sugar rush. A refined, well-thought-out brand that embraces the ancient art of perfumery while reinventing it beautifully!
